ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote', RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL( ApprovalStatus__c , 'Approved'), OR( ISCHANGED( Container_Special_Requirement_Comments__c ) , ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Special_Req_Price_Update__c ) , ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Feature_Option_Map_Check__c ) , ISCHANGED(CONTAINER_Requested_Ship_Date_Up_Check__c) , ISCHANGED(CONTAINER_Tentative_Ship_Sc_Update_Check__c) , ISCHANGED(CONTAINER_Tentative_Ship_Sc_Update_Check__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please Recall Approvals before making changes.
